rationale.R1.1: Reconstructing the thesis — assumption-free disentanglement via a modified ELBO with learnable factorized prior — is prerequisite for any substantive check; the contribution claim is legible but intersects a direct proof contradiction that undermines it.
rationale.R1.2: Load-bearing: the artifact contains an explicit internal contradiction. The introduction states 'FlexVAE makes no assumptions about the Lipschitz continuity of the generator network,' yet the proof section reads 'bounding the gradient of the divergence term by a Lipschitz constant of the generator.' The proof therefore imports the very assumption the method claims to eliminate, invalidating both the theoretical novelty claim and the convergence argument.
rationale.R1.3: Quantitative superiority claims (8% over FactorVAE, 12% over beta-TCVAE on Locatello et al.'s metric) are asserted without pointing to a table, figure, or appendix; alignment between these numbers and actual experimental outputs cannot be verified from this excerpt.
